content:
Awesome job! <:Ramona_love:1459077541829546007> 

As a newer player, one thing I was looking for in the **8-13 boss guide** was an explanation for why in some runs ||Ramona wasn't giving me card options in the final phase, which apparently happens if we kill the Child of Light during phase 3|| - so that detail would be helpful to include somewhere (or make it more obvious, if it is mentioned somewhere already but I missed it, despite re-reading the guide multiple times <:Helot_slack_off:1459092159465521184>)

IMO page 5 seems to suggest that she'll always provide card options, and the only thing being lost is no % max HP damage after the fusion
